worker_attempts.visible_answer:
Thank you for verifying your identity, Wei! I've looked into your referral history, and I can see what's happening. You have **4 referrals** on record, but only **2 have been completed**:

| Referral | Card Type | Status | Date |
|----------|-----------|--------|------|
| 1 | Bronze Rewards Card | ✅ COMPLETE | 10/20/2025 |
| 2 | Gold Rewards Card | ✅ COMPLETE | 10/22/2025 |
| 3 | Silver Rewards Card | ⏳ IN PROGRESS | 11/05/2025 |
| 4 | Platinum Rewards Card | ❌ REJECTED | 10/25/2025 |

Here's the breakdown:
- **2 referrals completed successfully** — you received bonuses for these
- **1 referral is still in progress** — the Silver Rewards Card referral from 11/05/2025 is still being processed
- **1 referral was rejected** — the Platinum Rewards Card referral from 10/25/2025 was not approved

Would you like me to look into why the Platinum Rewards Card referral was rejected, or do you have any other questions about your referrals?
